apply_method_note: Bash workspace out of disk space (useradd: No space left on device). git clone impossible. Patches applied directly to FUSE files using file tools. workspace-sync will push to git within 1h. HTML rebuild (node build.js html) required on next bash-enabled decider run.

patches.rationale: E-PRED-C is SG gravimeters 0.0 µGal (gravity null), not a timing lag. TLDR factual error severity=major per curmudgeon.md. Body prose was correct; only TLDR needed fixing.
patches.verification_pattern: git show origin/main:data/sections.json | grep -qF '(E-PRED-C, gravity null)'

patches.find: the Dome-vs-Globe row explicitly re-asserts the mechanism as <q>a physical structural boundary … where the aetheric return path meets the bottom plate of the ovoid cavity</q>.
patches.replace: the Dome-vs-Globe row explicitly re-asserts the mechanism as a physical structural boundary … where the aetheric return path meets the bottom plate of the ovoid cavity [both quotes archived verbatim at raw-text/02b-wins-V51-win064.txt, captured 2026-05-08; live page MD5 16d65a42722d2d5869842d14c8f699f0 has been byte-identical across 34 consecutive poller checks (~17 days through 2026-05-07T11:05:55Z), so the citation is auditable against both our archive and the dome's currently-served page].
patches.rationale: EXP-293 integration. WIN-064 detail_extra cited two V51-era dome quotes not present in our raw-text archive. Added archive-cite annotation pointing to new raw-text/02b-wins-V51-win064.txt file, plus MD5 hash corroborated by 34 consecutive poller hashes.

New raw-text archive file capturing verbatim WIN-064 entry from live wins.html (live page MD5 16d65a42722d2d5869842d14c8f699f0, 34 consecutive byte-identical poller hashes). Created per EXP-293 Option (b) — Wayback Machine unavailable (zero archived snapshots for john09289.github.io/predictions/wins.html).
patches.verification_pattern: git show origin/main:raw-text/02b-wins-V51-win064.txt | grep -qF 'bottom plate of the ovoid cavity'

html_rebuild_note: docs/index.html must be rebuilt via 'node build.js html' in a fresh clone after workspace-sync pushes data/sections.json and data/wins.json to git. Without rebuild the live site will not reflect the TLDR fix or WIN-064 citation annotation.
